---
title: "About Me."
sidebar: false 
---

![](images/f17b7a39-f8f1-4dc7-98d2-f7d9e1659687.jfif){fig-align="center" width="226"}

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Kırıkkale University, Turkey, 2009 - 2013.

-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  ASELSAN, Team Lead Engineer, 2025-Ongoing

2.  ASELSAN, Lead Engineer, 2022-2025

## Internships

1.  ASELSAN, Intern , year 2012

# Publications

1.  Altundağ, B., Eren, T., Kodanlı, E., Malkoç, S. K., Ünlüsoy, S., Biçer, İ., & Tutuk, K. (2016).\
    **Operating Room Scheduling and an Example Application.**

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Gurobi

# Hobbies

Swimming

Dancing

Tennis

# Links

[Download my CV](BurcuAltundag_CV.pdf)
